chapter_info.subject: Science
chapter_info.chapter_name: Mindful Eating: A Path to a Healthy Body

points: Major nutrients include Carbohydrates and Fats (Energy-giving), Proteins (Body-building), and Vitamins and Minerals (Protective).
Roughage (Dietary Fibre) helps in get rid of undigested food; Water facilitates nutrient absorption and waste removal.
Testing: Starch (Iodine -> Blue-black), Fats (Paper -> Oily patch), Protein (Copper Sulphate + Caustic Soda -> Violet).
Scurvy (Vitamin C) leads to bleeding gums; Goitre (Iodine) results in neck swelling; Rickets (Vitamin D/Calcium) affects bone growth.
Other deficiencies: Vitamin A (Night blindness), Vitamin B1 (Beriberi), and Iron (Anemia).
Balanced Diet: Provides all nutrients, roughage, and water in the right amount for growth and health.
Junk Food is high in calories but low in nutrients (leads to obesity); Millets are 'nutri-cereals' rich in fibre and minerals.
Food Miles measures the distance between producer and consumer; lowering it supports local farmers and environmental health.
Mid Day Meal (PM POSHAN) is an initiative to improve national nutritional status among children.
